data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for electronic signature capture, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of electronic signature capture (typed, drawn, or click-to-accept). The absence of such evidence indicates a gap in meeting this requirement, as the exploratory step did not yield any confirmation of this critical feature.
gaps: No evidence of electronic signature capture functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
